description_long: This is a weathered, boxy sedan with a predominantly metallic blue-gray exterior, heavily marked by rust and scratches, especially along the sides and edges. The body features angular, geometric lines and a pronounced central section, with visible seams and panel divisions. The surface is matte and rough, with rust patches and white scuff marks suggesting prolonged exposure to harsh urban environments. The undercarriage is visible in one view, showing a flat, rusted base with simple wheel wells and basic suspension details. The windows are not clearly defined, and the overall design is utilitarian, lacking decorative trim or modern styling cues. The car appears to be an older, possibly abandoned model, suitable for use as urban scenery or background detail.
description: A boxy, rusted blue-gray sedan with angular lines, heavy weathering, and a utilitarian, aged appearance. The surface is rough and matte, with visible rust and scratches.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow profile, rust patches, and deep scratches along the body panels.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the angular roof, central raised section, and extensive weathering across the upper surfaces.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with visible rust, scratches, and geometric panel lines.
description_view_3: Undercarriage view displaying a flat, rusted base, simple wheel wells, and basic suspension elements.
